=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN
Houston,Texas
Verizon Wireless Theater
2002 april  23

bw version, CD audio extraction 
Great sound


01. Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano) 
02. Tonight I'll Be Staying Here With You (Bob on piano, Larry on pedal steel) 
03. Highway 61 Revisited (Bob on piano) 
04. Blind Willie McTell (Bob on Piano and electric guitar, Larry on cittern) 
05. Watching The River Flow (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on slide guitar) 
06 Things Have Changed (Bob on piano) 
07. Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp and electric guitar) 
08. It Ain't Me, Babe (acoustic) (Bob on harp, Larry on pedal steel) 
09. Positively 4th Street (Bob on piano and acoustic guitar) 

01. High Water (For Charley Patton) (Bob on piano) 
02. Bye And Bye (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass) 
03. Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar) 
04. Can't Wait (Bob on piano) 
05. Summer Days (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass) 
06. Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano) 
07. All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano) 


Concert # 1505 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 5 of the 2003 US Spring Tour. 2003 concert # 16.
Concert # 5 with the 16th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal), Freddie Koella (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

1-6, 9-16 Bob Dylan (piano).
2, 8 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
4, 6, 7, 11 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
4 Larry Campbell (cittern).
5, 12 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).
7, 8 Bob Dylan (guitar).
8 acoustic with the band.
